name: Father
overview: Haj Ali has always tried to live a righteous life and be the best father he can be for his children, but when his son decides to marry a girl who comes from a family with a different belief system, will Haj Ali be able to welcome her into their lives and be like a father to her as well?

trailers.title: Serial Pedar - Teaser | سریال پدر - تیزر
